$comment: Canonical brand design tokens for the whole platform (parity P15 #109 — unified theming across APEX `src/` and the underworld web `underworld/web/`). APEX consumes these via src/domain/colors.js (the runtime token object mirrors these values); the underworld Tailwind config exposes them under the `brand` color group. Change a brand hex here and reflect it in both consumers so the two surfaces stay visually unified.

font.mono: JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace
